response.justification: Bogdan Szabo lacks the required C++ development experience on Windows platforms, as his resume primarily highlights Node.js, TypeScript, and DLang with minimal C++ exposure. While he has strong SQL and communication skills, his domain expertise in Fixed Income or Investment Banking is absent. His background in web/mobile development and AI-agent infrastructure does not align with the financial systems focus of this role.
strengths: Strong SQL experience with MongoDB and MySQL
Excellent verbal and written communication abilities (evidenced by workshops and talks)
Proven ability to work in agile environments with CI/CD practices
concerns: Insufficient C++ development experience (5–10 years required; resume shows limited C++ work)
No domain expertise in Fixed Income, Derivatives, or Investment Banking
Lacks experience with Windows platform development (mandatory skill)
